mapper.insert: INSERT INTO paradise.god(godName, godSex, godType, godPosition, godPlace, godMerit, godMaster) VALUES (#{godName}, #{godSex}, #{godType}, #{godPosition}, #{godPlace}, #{godMerit}, #{godMaster});
mapper.update: UPDATE paradise.god SET godName=#{godName}, godSex=#{godSex}, godType=#{godType}, godPosition=#{godPosition}, godPlace=#{godPlace}, godMerit=${godMerit}, godMaster=#{godMaster} WHERE godId = ${godId};
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM paradise.god WHERE ${type} LIKE concat('%', #{value}, '%')) limit ${searchOffset},${searchPageSize};
